CRIT-001.title: gRPC double->int64 for financial values
CRIT-001.verification: All core financial gRPC fields use int64 with _bp/_cents suffixes. Quantity uses string.

HIGH-001.title: isSmallOrder not persisted in DB schema
HIGH-001.verification: Added to ApprovalProcess struct, approval_processes table, sla_tracking table.

HIGH-002.title: Money.Multiply uses float64
HIGH-002.verification: Rewritten with big.Int. NewMoneyFromCents primary. NewMoney deprecated.

HIGH-004.title: SLA business hours calculation
HIGH-004.verification: EscalationThreshold/NotificationThreshold use addBusinessHours(). mdm_holidays table added.

newFindings.title: Residual double in SanctionItem fields
newFindings.recommendation: Change to int64 discount_reduction_bp and cumulative_reduction_bp

newFindings.title: OpenAPI schema missing unit descriptions
newFindings.recommendation: Add description fields specifying units (percentage points, rubles)

recommendationsForImplementation: MED-001/002: Fix error handling in AggregateLimit methods
MED-004: Consider topic consolidation from 44 to ~30
MED-006: Change event payload financial values to int64
MED-007: Consider SSE/WebSocket for real-time data
MED-008: Include calculation data in ThresholdViolated event
MED-009/010: Fix residual double in integration proto
LOW-006: Add unit descriptions to OpenAPI schema
